title: Polyalthia agusanensis
taxonomy: Polyalthia agusanensis is classified in the family Annonaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple family. This family includes over 2,000 species, many of which are native to tropical regions of the world. Annonaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, including Annonoideae, which includes the genus Polyalthia. Polyalthia agusanensis is a member of the genus Polyalthia, which comprises around 120 species of trees and shrubs. The classification of Polyalthia agusanensis is not yet fully understood, and more research is needed to determine its exact classification within the Annonaceae family.
